arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the contact flow module.

contact_flow_module_id.description: The unique identifier of the contact flow module.

content.description: The actual content or definition of the contact flow module.

description.description: A brief description of the contact flow module.

id.description: The identifier of the contact flow module, often the same as the module ID.

name.description: The name assigned to the contact flow module.

state.description: The current state of the contact flow module, such as active or inactive.

status.description: The status of the contact flow module, indicating its operational condition.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the contact flow module for organizational purposes.
